name: QA 1080
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1080

Exercise pcp-atop functionality.



Copyright (c) 2015,2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora_rawhide reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1080

Exercise pcp-atop functionality.

Copyright (c) 2015,2017 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test in a container, please run:

./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora_rawhide reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1080

Exercise pcp-atop functionality.



Copyright (c) 2015,2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora_rawhide reproduce
